programme.title: Contents Under Pressure
programme.desc: Hulk is shocked to see Brett behaving in a way that makes him think twice about his new friendship. But when Miss Marner drops by for a surprise visit, the gang must work together to get rid of her.

programme.title: Looking for Miniscule Microbes
programme.desc: How can microbes be of use at a birthday party? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of microorganisms. Have hands-on fun by experimenting with yeast, and get to know Satoshi Omura, a biochemist, who discovered medicine inside miniscule microbes.

programme.title: Student Astronaut Contest
programme.desc: A nationwide contest produced one lucky winner who got to train like a scientist astronaut alongside host Emily Calandrelli. Join Emily as she gets to know the winner and together, they prepare for space.

programme.title: Recovery
programme.desc: There is loads of donkey work down at the sanctuary, where Prince, a big stallion, needs an operation. The Junior Vets help dogs Harvey and Lois recover from their injuries with physio, swimming, and a doggy obstacle course!

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Trip to Canada
programme.desc: Everybody knows that at school you learn about letters and numbers, history, poetry, and lots of other things. But in Canada, at school, you can also learn about fishing. It's time for another trip. And, of course, we will meet one of Alim's penfriends - Sakari.

programme.title: Trip to Iran
programme.desc: Zoe has to make some complicated calculations, but she has no electronic device at hand that could help her with that, so she is in a bit of a panic. Milo does not seem to have an answer. As for Alim, he sees the solution to her problems in a trip to Iran!

programme.title: Dog Food Chef
programme.desc: Host Alie Ward presents a man who started a business that cooks fresh food for pets, a wireless phone-charging purse, a medicine-free pain-relieving device and a teenager who invented a novel way to clean water.

programme.title: Hot Water
programme.desc: An increase in water temperature in a Polish lake is threatening the local fish population. The MeteoHeroes must identify and solve the problem. Thermo and Ventum are dispatched to investigate.

programme.title: Could We Do Without Plankton?
programme.desc: Plankton are the foundations of the ocean food chain. Without them, pretty much nothing could survive. A single teaspoon of sea water can contain over one million living organisms.

programme.title: What's Living in This Cave?
programme.desc: Bat colonies in caves bring a whole world of creatures with them. Cockroaches and centipedes love their guano. Snakes and frogs are happy to have bats for dinner.

programme.title: Fish
programme.desc: Paint a fish with a water-based technique.

programme.title: How Tall is a Tree?
programme.desc: How can we figure out the height of tall objects such as a tree or a basketball net without using a ladder? In this episode we learn how indirect measurements, proportions, and estimation can be used to compute linear measures with surprising accuracy.

programme.title: Man v Monkey
programme.desc: The doctors go head-to-head in a man vs monkey contest to demonstrate the power of the pelvis. Dr. Dan and Dr. Raph take you on a safari, and the Cupboard of Everything is on the move to the 1950s.

programme.title: Could We Do Without Plankton?
programme.desc: Plankton are the foundations of the ocean food chain. Without them, pretty much nothing could survive. A single teaspoon of sea water can contain over one million living organisms.

programme.title: Emptying Your Bladder
programme.desc: The doctors drink their fill to show what happens to your bladder when you wee. Dr. Chris meets a robot that can zap bad cells. A patient in the emergency room has a sausage finger, and another has swallowed a coin.

programme.title: New Names
programme.desc: Can the Junior Vets determine the sex of a very special penguin? Six cute kittens need checkups and new names - meet X-ray, Smudge, and, of course, baby Johnny! And Paul, the rat, has trouble breathing.

programme.title: Fish
programme.desc: Paint a fish with a water-based technique.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

E131 - Trico's Fake Hair/Sheepdog Wanted/Driving Sheep
programme.desc: Trico starts wearing a Serge-style toupee. Wanda is outraged!

programme.title: E115 - Treasure!/Homeless
programme.desc: In a dark and cobwebby corner of his attic, Mr. Bean finds a treasure map. The hunt is on! But tricky clues lead Bean up the chimney, round the bend, down the garden path, up the blinking wall and nearly all the way to Australia.

programme.title: E94 - Alone At Sea/Greg The Babysitter
programme.desc: Steven and Greg take a boat trip out to sea and find themselves in dangerous water.

programme.title: E89 - B. Is That You?/Everything's Jake/The Visitor/The Cooler/The Mountain
programme.desc: After a memorial for a fallen ally, Jake starts acting very strange.

programme.title: E1 - Laser Light Cannon/Cheeseburger Backpack/Gem Glow
programme.desc: A magical comet hurtles toward Beach City, and Steven must dig through his father's collection of old junk, and the past, to find the weapon that can save the town.

programme.title: E12 - Mordecai And The Rigbys/Muscle Woman/Trash Boat/That's My Television/Return Of Mordec
programme.desc: When Mordecai and Rigby order T-shirts for their non-existent band (Mordecai and the Rigbys), Margaret mistakes them for actual musicians.

programme.title: E101 - The Burger/The Assistant
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin want to find a heathy dinner option for their family because they are hooked on Joyful Burger, but an evil food consortium has monopolized the food industry.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mecha Mutt Menace E1 -Scooby-Doo! Mecha Mutt Menace
programme.desc: A visit to the Houston Space Center finds the Scooby gang facing a canine robot, which seems to have been possessed by a specter from outer space.

programme.title: E204 - The Good, The Bad, And The Jelly/Coin Robber
programme.desc: Mike's group engages in their first battle with Christa, and they are overwhelmed by her power, even losing the Hero Book. In a moment of crisis, Mike reveals a new power, 'Comical Create'.

programme.title: E124 - Brick 3000/Mo's Amazing Talent
programme.desc: M.Brick is really stressed! He has to do a presentation about technology, but he's completely lost… Mo and Sam need to do something, or M.Brick will remain stressed forever.

programme.desc: Holly gets frustrated when Ben uses his elf skills to win games. Then Ben gets frustrated when Holly uses her magic to win the games. // King Thistle needs medicine. Nanny Plum, Holly and Ben collect the ingredients for a potion to make him better.

programme.title: E402 - Whistling
programme.desc: Peppa tries to learn how to whistle after she realizes that seemingly everyone but her can do it.

programme.title: E407 - Spring
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig organises a chocolate egg hunt for Peppa and her friends. Will the piglets track down the treats?

programme.desc: Mix and Motor's favorite TV star has a new movie playing in Builder Cove, if the pups can build place to watch it! // When Grandpa tells the pups about a secret buried treasure, they find out the key to finding this treasure is construction teamwork!

programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.desc: Peppa tries to learn how to whistle after she realizes that seemingly everyone but her can do it.

programme.title: E316 - Pups Bear-Ly Save Danny / Pups Save The Mayor's Tulips
programme.desc: Daring Danny X is at it again! This time he's stuck in a tree over a deep canyon and is pursued by hungry bears. // Mayor Humdinger sabotages Mayor Goodway's perfect petals for the tulip contest. Chase and Rocky to the rescue!

programme.title: E105 - Fun And Games / King Thistle Is Not Well
programme.desc: Holly gets frustrated when Ben uses his elf skills to win games. Then Ben gets frustrated when Holly uses her magic to win the games. // King Thistle needs medicine. Nanny Plum, Holly and Ben collect the ingredients for a potion to make him better.

programme.title: E203 - Isa's Royal Garden Party / Sammy's Surprise
programme.desc: The Queen of Reptiles is visiting Isa, but the garden's a mess! Dora helps her get everything ready in time for La Reina's visit. / Dora meets Sammy the Sloth, who needs to get to Day Camp on time so he can show everyone a special surprise.

programme.title: E102 - Birthday Party / Tick Tock Mr. Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile wants to be a good guest at Daisy's birthday party since he's never been to one before. // Rushing to get to a concert on time, Mr. Crocodile and Daisy misplace their tickets at Mom's Box and Ship Shop.

programme.title: E102 - Bada-Bam / The Barbamartians
programme.desc: Barbabright captured a melody from Mars. The Barbapapas build a rocket to go to the red planet. // While travelling to Mars, the Barbapapas meet a family of Barbamartians. They have no time to get acquainted when a giant plant attacks the village.

programme.title: E1015 - Pups Save A Baby Caribou / Pups Save Luke And His Luke-Alike
programme.desc: When a baby caribou winds up speeding down a mountainside. It's up to the PAW Patrol to save the calf and reunite him with his family. / When Luke Stars gets blown away in a giant tumbleweed, Digi and Tal make a duplicate which dances out of control.

programme.title: E104 - Tailball
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.desc: Cali gets lost in the woods. // Daring Danny X's harness loosens while kite-surfing.

programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: E102 - Present / Movie / Vinny
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: Beijing Spring - The Democracy Wall Movement In China
programme.desc: Mao's death was followed by a very short period of freedom of expression in China. Known as the 'Beijing Spring', it was part of the new head of state Deng Xiaoping's desire to distance himself from the mistakes of the Cultural Revolution.

programme.desc: There's a girder out of place on Swoppiton Bridge, and unless Nori can fix it, that bridge is coming down! Luckily, Mojo's got the tops, and Bo's got the skills to help get it done.

programme.title: E15 - Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let's play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: L'info du jour[Live]
programme.desc: Un éclairage sur un événement marquant de l'actualité du jour, sélectionné pour sa portée et ses implications. Décrypté avec du recul, il permet de comprendre les enjeux sous-jacents, les conséquences possibles et les dynamiques qui façonnent le monde d'aujourd'hui.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. programme.title: Chronique culture[Live]
programme.desc: Chaque matin, nos chroniqueurs culture passent en revue les tendances émergentes dans la photographie, la musique, le cinéma, la littérature et la mode. Ils analysent les courants actuels et offrent un regard éclairé sur les créations qui façonnent l'univers culturel d'aujourd'hui.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: E156
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: E426
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: Phoenix Panorama
programme.desc: PHOENIX PANORAMA : To entertain, educate and inform audiences, Panoramic Eyeshot of Phoenix, a series of captivating and controversial documentaries, includes segments on current affairs, historical anniversaries and exclusive insider views on present developments.

programme.title: E426
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E35
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E28 - Secrets Of The Founding Fathers
programme.desc: The Founding Fathers established the pillars of freedom and democracy. New information has emerged about the secrets of these important historical figures. What truths have remained in the shadows?

programme.title: E29 - The Weird Wild West
programme.desc: The American frontier is rich with legends of Native Americans and outlaws, but also eerie tales of cursed mountains, monsters, and UFOs. Could these tales be true? Is the Wild West stranger than we think?

programme.title: E5 - Beastly Revelations
programme.desc: From a mythical monster that turns out to be real to one of the deadliest prehistoric animals on the planet, these startling discoveries shock and terrify the world.

programme.title: E4 - Bad Taste
programme.desc: The legend that warns against digging on Skinwalker Ranch becomes all too real as the team breaks ground near the Triangle.

programme.title: E8 - Occupational Hazards
programme.desc: You thought your job was tough? Uncover the dangerous gigs of the past – from mercury-poisoned hat makers to kids crawling through chimneys – and imagine the risks behind everyday jobs of old.

programme.title: E13 - The World In Your Palm
programme.desc: The biggest names in computers go head-to-head in a race to create the first portable computers. Through massive failures and shocking alliances, they'll usher in their first-ever handheld device.

programme.title: E55 - Aix-Les-Bains (Best-Of)
programme.desc: The best moments of the show in Aix-les-Bains.

programme.title: E10 - Airelles At Versailles Palace, Rather An Immersion Than A Visit
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: E1 - Rock'n Flight
programme.desc: Al Comet, alias Alain Monod, is a former member of the Young Gods, pioneers of electro industrial music. At 65, he traded his electric guitar for an Indian sitar. And when he is not giving concerts, it is in the air that he practices his other passion, aerial acrobatics.

programme.title: E7 - Noni, The Tree With A Thousand Virtues
programme.desc: In Maupiti as well as in Taravao, noni is cultivated. This shrub, typical of the Polynesian islands, has a bad reputation because of its fruit's unbearable smell. Yet it is used for its antibiotic and antioxidant properties in medicine and also in cooking, when its juice is extracted.

programme.title: E19 - Special Haute Couture Shows Autumn/Winter 2023-2024
programme.desc: The best of the season with Dior, Charles de Vilmorin, Schiaparelli, Iris Van Herpen, Chanel, Stephane Rolland, Julien Fournier, and Jean Paul Gaultier. Four designers stand out: Mohammed Ashi, Sara Chraibi, Rahul Mishra, and Adeline Andre. Male fashion with Pharrell Williams for Louis Vuitton, Kim Jones for Dior and EgonLab.

programme.title: Mise Au Point:2025-2026
programme.desc: The best reports from ''Mise au Point'', the programme that takes a fresh look at national and international news events. programme.title: E5 - Frederique Gourdon - The Quest For The Living
programme.desc: Time's imprint lies at the heart of Frederique Gourdon's artistic exploration. After years of working with mixed media-painting, engraving, collage-she experienced a profound encounter in 2015 with paper and plant fiber.

programme.desc: A Labrador cross and its partner help prevent ecological disaster in Canada, a Lagotto Romagnolo unearths a rare delicacy in Washington forests, and a Belgian malinois team tracks down the critically endangered geometric tortoise to save the species.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of the Wolf
programme.desc: In the remote wilderness of the Carpathian Mountains lives an elusive predator that has inspired awe and fear throughout history: the Eurasian wolf. Discover the vital role that these once-misunderstood hunters play in protecting their ecosystem.

programme.title: E5 - The Scent Detectives

programme.title: E2 - Carcassonne
programme.desc: Travel to a centuries-old French fortress, home to some of history's greatest empires. Carcassone, once a center of wealth and culture, is now a haven for wildlife. Birds, wild boar, and armies of insects endure in its bountiful surroundings.

programme.title: E6 - Bald is Beautiful
programme.desc: After a terrible accident at the nursery forest school, life changes drastically for nine-month-old Alejandra. And at forest school, the students enjoy a poolside classroom where Valentino proves he’s much more than just a class clown.

programme.title: E4 - Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: Welcome Anna’s clan back to Marina Bay, where two otter families have been trespassing. Feel the heat when Mia catches Anna’s scent and hustles the Townies out of reach. Then hold tight as the Nomads remain blissfully unaware of the coming conflict.

programme.title: E5 - Battle for the Bay
programme.desc: Follow the Bay Family’s matriarch as she chases the Nomads out of her territory for good, and examine the surprising birthing den where the Townies’ leader, Mia, settles in. Then kick back with the Mangrove Family as they pal around with stray dogs.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of Jungles
programme.desc: Plunge into crystal-clear seas to explore the Tubbataha Reef, which rests on an extinct underwater volcano where shallow lagoons shelter sea turtles and tiger sharks. Take flight with tarsiers as they hunt insects using powerful leaps between trees.

programme.title: E3 - Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: It's time for Blippi to get curious & creative! A mysterious book appears in the clubhouse, & when Blippi opens it, the brand-new Curiosity Crew jumps out! After helping the crew figure out what they're looking for (popsicles!), Blippi & Meekah join them on some creative adventures. They learn all about how to mix colors to make a beautiful rainbow painting, shrink down to dance with Bendjamin the Klutz & ride a library cart on a hunt for books about dinosaurs!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & bedtime songs! Mummy helps Mia begin her nighttime routine by tucking her toys into cozy spaces. Then, they try out some super simple & calming animal-related yoga poses to help Mia have a restful sleep. Daddy also shows Mia that routines can be fun with his 'brush your teeth dance'! Finally, Mummy & Daddy play a beautiful lullaby on their guitars to help soothe the kids to sleep under the twinkling stars.

programme.title: E3 - Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready for sky-high & super fun adventures with JJ & his friends! First, Astronauts JJ & Mimi blast off into space, soaring past stars & planets before landing on the moon for a cheesy snack! When Boba loses his special balloon, the friends set off in a hot air balloon craft for a chase of a lifetime. The action continues as JJ & Wally train to be firefighters, but Wally's goofing around turns him into the one who needs saving!

programme.title: E1 - Shapes, Songs & Story Time!
programme.desc: Join Ms. Appleberry & JJ for a learning adventure! Explore the letters B, C, R & U through fun activities. Play pretend as you make 'beep-beep' sounds on a bus & act like a playful pup. Sing along to classic songs, discover surprises inside the Melon Learning Box with a special guest & enjoy a rainy day adventure.

programme.title: E2 - How Does It Work?!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering, 'How does it work?!' Join Blippi & his robot buddy FETCH on an adventure to find the answers! Blippi shrinks down to fly inside a beehive & learn how honey is made, & explores a garbage truck to find out why flies love it so much. Then, it’s a trip through a factory to see how chocolate is made! The adventure even travels through time as Blippi meets his great-grandpa to see the very first cars. Plus, Blippi & FETCH help a nervous crane learn to build a skyscraper!

programme.title: E3 - Baby John's Big World Adventure!
programme.desc: Join Baby John on a big world adventure! First, he & his friends explore the reptile zoo to learn all about the scaly creatures. Then, it's time to learn about bugs at the insect park! The adventure gets out of this world as Jack, Jill & Baby John explore a new adventure: space camp! They learn how to be an astronaut & visit other planets as they fly a rocket ship & train in zero gravity!

programme.title: E1 - A Fun School Day with JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his friends for a fun school day at Melon Patch Academy! Ms. Appleberry finds exciting ways to learn, like using building blocks & drawings to practice the alphabet. Then, the kids play a fun guessing game to learn all about the five senses & how to sign them in ASL! The learning continues as they sing about the days of the week, play a fun alphabet photo game on a rainy day & enjoy story time with the whole family. It's a day packed with learning & fun!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E2 - How Does It Work?!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering, 'How does it work?!' Join Blippi & his robot buddy FETCH on an adventure to find the answers! Blippi shrinks down to fly inside a beehive & learn how honey is made, & explores a garbage truck to find out why flies love it so much. Then, it’s a trip through a factory to see how chocolate is made! The adventure even travels through time as Blippi meets his great-grandpa to see the very first cars. Plus, Blippi & FETCH help a nervous crane learn to build a skyscraper!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: It's time for Blippi to get curious & creative! A mysterious book appears in the clubhouse, & when Blippi opens it, the brand-new Curiosity Crew jumps out! After helping the crew figure out what they're looking for (popsicles!), Blippi & Meekah join them on some creative adventures. They learn all about how to mix colors to make a beautiful rainbow painting, shrink down to dance with Bendjamin the Klutz & ride a library cart on a hunt for books about dinosaurs!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & bedtime songs! Mummy helps Mia begin her nighttime routine by tucking her toys into cozy spaces. Then, they try out some super simple & calming animal-related yoga poses to help Mia have a restful sleep. Daddy also shows Mia that routines can be fun with his 'brush your teeth dance'! Finally, Mummy & Daddy play a beautiful lullaby on their guitars to help soothe the kids to sleep under the twinkling stars.

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E1 - Shapes, Songs & Story Time!
programme.desc: Join Ms. Appleberry & JJ for a learning adventure! Explore the letters B, C, R & U through fun activities. Play pretend as you make 'beep-beep' sounds on a bus & act like a playful pup. Sing along to classic songs, discover surprises inside the Melon Learning Box with a special guest & enjoy a rainy day adventure.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: E12 - Creature Feature
programme.desc: After Max dozes off before a double feature, Ben and Gwen are left to save the drive-in on their own when evil magician Hex brings the film monster 'that'to life and unleashes it on the cinemagoers.

programme.desc: Ben and Gwen engage in a highly competitive paper airplane war, but when alien-tech drones bombard the Rustbucket, they must work together to foil the aerial attack and find out who's behind it.

programme.desc: When Gwen enters a pancake-eating contest at the world-famous Pancake Palace, Ben spots the Bugg Brothers and must stop them before they obtain an endless supply of what fuels their creations.

programme.title: Listen To The Troubles Of Virgins
Listen To The Troubles Of Virgins
E7
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: Saptagiri Express
programme.desc: Saptagiri, a happy-go-lucky actor, is forced to do his late father's job after his demise. However, he soon learns that his father was actually murdered and embarks on a quest for vengeance.

programme.title: Hum Kisise Kum Nahin (2002)
programme.desc: Gangster Munna Bhai meets Komal and falls in love with her. In order to marry her, he must first convince Dr. Rastogi, Komal's elder brother.

programme.title: Dream Girl 2
programme.desc: Karam secretly turns his female alter ego into a dancer and woos a millionaire''s son in hopes of clearing his family debts and impressing his fiancee''s father. Release Year: 2023 Director: Raaj Shaandilyaa Awards: 2024 Winner Dada Saheb Phalke AwardBest Comic ActorAyushmann Khurrana

programme.title: E6 - 「男生邀請日」約會開啟
programme.desc: 由伊能靜、黃聖依、朱正廷、金子涵、戴燕妮、張純燁6位常駐戀愛觀察員、微反應專家姜振宇以及鄭爽組成「戀愛觀察團」，見證素人嘉賓們從素不相識到牽手成功的浪漫愛情故事。

programme.title: E35
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E3 - 90後父母展現新型帶娃小妙招
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E3 - 90後父母展現新型帶娃小妙招
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E16 - 吳鎮宇助力沉浸式教學
programme.desc: 一檔演員搭檔研習進階真人秀，由關錦鵬、吳鎮宇、許鞍華擔當“研習制作人”，參與研習階段任務、監制和拍攝作品，蘇可擔任“研習指導”，陳喬恩、謝娜、李維嘉、吳昕作為“研習助力團”；十多位參與的青年演員，通過共同的生活和訓練，共同開啟尋找搭檔的研習生活。

programme.title: E5 - 趙麗穎黃子韜爆笑猜歌
programme.desc: 沉浸式IP推理真人秀，由謝娜、黃子韜、寧靜、古力娜扎、孫紅雷、孫千、徐志勝組成「萌探家族」，他們將根據一部經典IP，進行實景還原、改編等演繹原劇片段，通過劇情的疑點及遊戲環節，獲取劇情線索，尋找劇情真相！

programme.title: E35
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E6 - 家國情懷
programme.desc: 運用了經常出現在電影中的特效技術來拍攝，讓觀眾從不同的角度觀看，像置身於拍攝現場一樣；除了有課本上的詩詞內容外，還融入國風體育運動、美術繪畫、音樂表演等內容，利用豐富有趣的環節形式激發青少年學習傳統文化的熱情。

programme.title: E6 - 快樂出海 劉宇寧破碎尖叫
programme.desc: 由劉宇寧、龔俊、孫紅雷、李乃文、陳赫、陳星旭、王玉雯、歐陽娣娣組成爆笑「地球團」，沿著地球脈絡從中國出發，感受北緯40度的煙火氣，通過遊戲任務解鎖各地文化與美食，用新鮮有趣的方式，探索全世界的同頻快樂。

programme.title: E5 - 青春校園劇超甜來襲
programme.desc: 一檔演員搭檔研習進階真人秀，由關錦鵬、吳鎮宇、許鞍華擔當“研習制作人”，參與研習階段任務、監制和拍攝作品，蘇可擔任“研習指導”，陳喬恩、謝娜、李維嘉、吳昕作為“研習助力團”；十多位參與的青年演員，通過共同的生活和訓練，共同開啟尋找搭檔的研習生活。

programme.title: E3 - 90後父母展現新型帶娃小妙招
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: In Back to the Future Part III, Marty travels to 1885 to save Doc from an outlaw. Packed with laughs, action, and heart, it's the epic Wild West finale to the beloved trilogy.

programme.title: E2 - Stingled Out
programme.desc: The deck team struggles to find their footing, and big mistakes are made. A stew begins to flirt with all male crewmembers on board. The chef struggles to get a handle on eccentric guest requests. Tension between two deckhands escalates to a heated argument.

programme.title: E5 - Let The Games Vegan
programme.desc: A massive changeover rocks the boat. A stew gets pulled in multiple and a flirty love triangle starts to heat up. The chef struggles to cater to vegan guests with particular palates and complaints.

programme.title: E14 - Guilt Trip
programme.desc: Two crew members contend with whether or not to feel guilty after committing a major betrayal. A crew member returns and is shocked to discover that everything has changed.

programme.title: E16 - Stricken Nuggets
programme.desc: An argument over a jet ski causes a major rift in the deck team. A long-held bromance is threatened. A heart-to-heart about commitment is interrupted and tempers flare in multiple directions.

programme.desc: The war is over, the Confederacy having surrendered, freeing the slaves. But most people seem interested only in using and abusing the emancipated blacks in the same old way.

programme.desc: While attending a Las Vegas convention, Jessica becomes involved when the boyfriend of her editor's daughter becomes a murder suspect.

programme.title: E3 - Bad News
programme.desc: With the gas still not connected in the kitchen, Sarah is unable to train her staff or test the new menu. As the restaurant launch fast approaches there’s more bad news that could put Sarah’s big plans in jeopardy.

programme.title: E3 - Bolivia
programme.desc: In the South American country of Bolivia, Catfish and Rooftop put their bravery to the test. This duo goes 0 for 2 in the ring testing out their fight skills participating in traditional Tinku fighting and getting smacked down by Bolivia’s Fighting Cholitas. They also face a sketchy ride up death rode just to mountain bike down an equally dangerous path. Catfish has yet to keep a meal down as our bikers try llama brains and Rooftop nearly gets run over as a dancing zebra in the streets. The two top their Bolivian trip off with a trip to the mines on the hunt for silver. With some of the most dangerous activities yet, will Rooftop and Catfish be able to leave Bolivia with just a few bumps and bruises from along the way?

programme.title: E4 - Western Australia: Broome - The Pearl of Western Australia
programme.desc: Sara explores Yellow Water in Kakadu National Park. She learns about the different birds that visit Yellow Water and prepares an Australian-Asian fusion feast.

programme.title: E3 - Manila
programme.desc: Getting around this city is like navigating a bee hive...except the bees are driving cars, trucks and trikes!

programme.title: E4 - Western Australia: Broome - The Pearl of Western Australia

programme.title: E3 - Roots Run Deep
programme.desc: After a morning on the Bayou, the Duck Camp Dinners crew enjoy a fresh cooked dinner while discussing the changing coastal wetlands of Louisiana. Jean-Paul gets to finally a hunt an area he had only heard about as a young man, and takes in the beauty of the live cypress trees this camp is known for.

programme.title: E3 - Bolivia
programme.desc: In the South American country of Bolivia, Catfish and Rooftop put their bravery to the test. This duo goes 0 for 2 in the ring testing out their fight skills participating in traditional Tinku fighting and getting smacked down by Bolivia’s Fighting Cholitas. They also face a sketchy ride up death rode just to mountain bike down an equally dangerous path. Catfish has yet to keep a meal down as our bikers try llama brains and Rooftop nearly gets run over as a dancing zebra in the streets. The two top their Bolivian trip off with a trip to the mines on the hunt for silver. With some of the most dangerous activities yet, will Rooftop and Catfish be able to leave Bolivia with just a few bumps and bruises from along the way?

programme.title: Monster Wore Jeans
programme.desc: Tsu, a police officer, has a happy life with his wife, who's pregnant. But one day when he gets a tip that a bank is about to be robbed, he rushes to it but killed. The hostage Gucci then holds the loot. Tsu becomes a vampire when a cat jumps on his body and is hit by lightning. Not until he went to the hospital did he realize he was dead and needs electric recharge to be alive. In order to keep his wife from being sad, he doesn't tell her the truth. Even when his best friend Mr. Big and Gucci find it out, he asks them to keep in secret. To get back the loot, the robbers seize both Gucci and Tsu's wife, forcing Tsu to bring the loot to exchange them...

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: E354
programme.desc: A reality talk show that offers a candid and often humorous look at the workplace through the eyes of Korea's most outspoken bosses. Each episode follows prominent CEOs, entertainers, and professionals as they go about their daily routines and interact with their employees. Through real workplace situations, the show reveals the challenges of leadership, communication, and management.

programme.title: THE SHADOW'S EDGE
programme.desc: A crew of criminal prodigies disappears with billions, evading capture by outsmarting the formidable “Sky Eye” surveillance system. Desperate and outmaneuvered, the Macau police enlist the help of a legend-Wong Tak-Chung, a retired tracking expert. He mentors rookie officer He Qiuguo and rebuilds an elite surveillance unit. Their mission: to track down the elusive “Wolf King,” Fu Longsheng, the mastermind behind the heist. As the police close in, the thieves spring a trap of their own. Brains clash, loyalties are tested, and the ultimate cat-and-mouse game is about to begin...
